meaning: 智能磁盘控制器;Internet Data Center,互联网数据中心
examples: Look at the IDC study released last week.
IDC expects the capacity shipped to increase by 50% plus this year.
Research firm IDC says net margins on business PCs are at 5%, down from 20% in 1995.
By contrast, IDC reports that just 66.9 million personal computers were sold during the same period.
